title: shorea hemsleyana
intro: Shorea hemsleyana, also known as the Hemsl's Shorea, is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The bark of Shorea hemsleyana has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Shorea hemsleyana include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and burns. Herbal preparations of Shorea hemsleyana include extracts and oils that can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
